hero.title: Yeshivat Peer Yisroel
hero.subtitle: Named after the Holy Rebbe R' Yisrael of Stolin ZT"L

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.subtitle: Torah, Fear of Heaven & Fine Character
mission.text: Yeshivat Peer Yisroel, named after the Holy Rebbe R' Yisrael of Stolin ZT"L, is dedicated to raising a generation of Torah scholars who illuminate the Land of Israel with Torah and light. The yeshiva welcomes talented students from former CIS countries who aspire to grow in Torah.

donate.subtitle: Partner in Building a Beit Midrash
donate.impact: Every donation helps raise a generation of Torah scholars
